Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: We are given a DECLARE model and asked to add constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application process The process involves sensitive attributes and decisions We are to add constraints that ensure the sequence of activities does not discriminate based on these attributes Steps We note that the given model does not have any biasmitigating constraints

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that the model does not currently have activities for sensitive attributes We must assume that the process includes activities that reveal sensitive attributes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets assume the following activities that might be present in a real process CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantRace And decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo Example constraints we might add a Coexistence If a decision activity occurs then a ManualReview activity must also be present b Precedence Before making a decision a BiasMitigationCheck must have been performed c Nonsuccession Prevent a direct succession from a sensitive attribute event to a decision event

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to add new constraints We must decide on the constraints to add Lets think about the example given in the instructions We might require that for sensitive applicants certain decision steps must be preceded by a manual review or a bias mitigation check

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets design a few constraints 1 We want to ensure that for every decision there is a ManualReview activity that occurs in the trace This can be done with a coexistence constraint 2 We want to ensure that before a decision is made a BiasMitigationCheck activity must have occurred This can be done with a precedence constraint 3 We want to prevent that a CheckApplicantRace activity is immediately followed by a Reject We can use a non succession constraint

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to add 1 Coexistence constraints for each decision activity with ManualReview 2 Precedence constraints for each decision activity to be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck 3 Non succession constraint CheckApplicantRace Reject is forbidden 4 Chainresponse constraint CheckApplicantRace must be followed by BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must be cautious because the existing model does not have these activities We are adding constraints that involve them so effectively we are adding these activities to the process We are not adding any unary constraints for these new activities The coexistence constraint already ensures that if a decision activity is present then ManualReview is present

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We might also add a chainresponse constraint that if CheckApplicantRace occurs then the next activity must be BiasMitigationCheck
